3262370.name: The Specters Show
3262370.description:
You're a YouTuber hunting for content in Key Studios, an abandoned mascot studio that used to make cheerful characters and live shows. What starts as a simple exploration video turns into something way darker. The mascots that once brought joy to kids aren't as lifeless as they should be.

The Specters Show is a first-person mascot horror game mixing stealth, exploration, and survival. Search through dark offices, old soundstages, and backstage storage while trying to figure out what really happened here. Every room and hallway could be hiding something, whether it's a clue to the studio's past or one of the mascots in their twisted new form.

WHAT YOU'LL GET

Creepy Mascot Encounters Meet the first haunted mascot in Chapter 1. They move weird, sound unsettling, and you never know what they'll do next.

Exploration and Investigation Poke around offices, stages, storage rooms, and backstage areas to find lore and hidden secrets about what went wrong at Key Studios.

Stealth Gameplay Hide behind props, stay in the shadows, and time your movements carefully. Getting caught is not an option.

Atmosphere That Gets Under Your Skin Flickering lights, distorted audio, and environmental details work together to keep you on edge the whole time.

YouTuber Camera Perspective You're playing as a content creator filming everything. The camera adds gameplay mechanics and makes the horror feel more real.

Story Through Collectibles Find notes, tapes, and recordings scattered around the studio that reveal Key Studios' dark history and how the mascots became what they are now.

Multiple Chapters Chapter 1 starts you off in the main studio area. Future chapters will take you deeper into more messed up parts of the building.

Jump Scares and Constant Dread Expect mascots to show up when you least want them to, props that suddenly move, and the feeling that something's always watching you.
3262370.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
